name: multi_grep
description: Search for multiple patterns across specified files/directories in one call. Supports case-insensitive search, file-only results (no line numbers), context lines, include file-type filtering, and limiting output. Patterns are OR-combined: any line matching any pattern is shown.
when_to_use: Use when you need to search for several related patterns across files. Replaces 2-4 separate grep calls that would otherwise be needed to find all relevant lines. Use include= to filter by file extension (e.g., include=*.c,*.h for C source files). Particularly useful for finding function definitions, error codes, or related keyword groups across mixed-language projects.

parameters.name: patterns
parameters.description: Pipe-separated patterns to search for, e.g. 'def handle|VERP|bounce|parse_id'

parameters.name: targets
parameters.description: Comma-separated file paths or directories to search, e.g. '/app/app/email_utils.py,/app/app/models.py' or '/app/app/'

parameters.name: file_only
parameters.description: Only show filenames, not matching lines (default: false)

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Number of context lines before/after each match (default: 0)

parameters.name: max_matches
parameters.description: Maximum number of matches to show (default: 60)

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated file name patterns to include, e.g. '*.c,*.h' to only search .c and .h files

examples.expected: Lines matching any of the patterns in the specified files, with line numbers.
Lines matching patterns only in .c and .h files under /app.
List of Go files under /app/pkg/services/ngalert/state that contain these function names.
Lines matching any pattern with 1 line of context before/after, up to 20 matches.

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces 2-4 separate grep calls (one per pattern or one per file) with a single script call. The include= filter avoids searching irrelevant file types (e.g., generated files, binaries) reducing output volume and token usage. Particularly valuable for mixed-language projects where you only want to search .c and .h files.
